title: Bedrock Texture Loader
description: This mod allows Minecraft Java Edition to use Bedrock Edition texture packs.
body:
**Bedrock Texture Pack Loader**

Use Bedrock Edition texture packs in Minecraft Java! Just drop your `.mcpack` into the resource pack folder while on the resource pack screen and activate it.

**Current Features:**

* Basic textures (blocks, items)
* Sounds
* Armor textures
* HUD and fonts

**Limitations:**

* Armor models and block entities may break
* Animations not supported
* Extremely early development – expect bugs!
